scripts.db:seed:local: npm run seed && wrangler d1 execute dresite-recipes --local --file=data/seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: npm run seed && wrangler d1 execute dresite-recipes --remote --file=data/seed.sql
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --local
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name bakedwithdre
